system.description: The Iron Blessed channels resonance through their formations in a controlled burst. Apply Guard (6 + RESONANCE) to yourself. All allies within 10 feet gain Guard (3 + RESONANCE). Any enemy within 10 feet that makes a melee attack against the Iron Blessed this turn takes 3 + RESONANCE damage from formation spines on contact. The Orthodoxy's training makes this disciplined, directed, and reliable.
